title: Dock Remainder Variation
intendedTensionBeat: Tempting larger clears are available, but the lower route rewards low-residue dock discipline.
intendedReleaseBeat: A clean triple route opens the urgent puppy while leaving the dock calm for the pivot.
expectedPath: Prefer clean triples and low-residue route clears to rescue the lower puppy first, then pivot to the safer upper puppy.
expectedFailMode: Player takes tempting 4/5 groups, fills dock, and has to waste rescue tempo repairing it.
designNotes: Starts the L16-L20 half-band by varying dock discipline without adding active vine pressure.
